description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe with a bold, urban design, featuring a predominantly black and dark gray color scheme accented by deep red around the collar and tongue. The upper is constructed from a mix of synthetic materials, with a textured pattern and reinforced overlays for durability. The midsole is thick and sculpted, providing substantial cushioning and a futuristic aesthetic, while the outsole is robust and likely made of rubber for traction. Notable details include a stylized hand gesture graphic and the phrase 'Heavy Metal!' on the lateral side, as well as metallic spike-like embellishments on the heel. The shoe is equipped with standard black laces and has a padded, high-cut collar for ankle support. The overall appearance is aggressive and modern, suitable for streetwear or urban sports.
description: A high-top, black and gray athletic shoe with red accents, metallic heel spikes, and bold graphic details. Features a thick sculpted sole and standard lacing for a striking urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Heavy Metal!' text, hand gesture graphic, and metallic heel spikes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black laces, textured toe box, and red tongue lining.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible sculpted sole and red collar, but without the lateral graphics.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the metallic spike embellishments on the heel and padded red collar.
attribute_logo: hand gesture graphic and 'Heavy Metal!' text on the lateral side in red and white
